title: Endure Extreme Harm
description: Use this oracle when you roll a miss on Endure Harm and both the Wounded and Maimed conditions are already marked. Roll to determine the dire consequence of suffering extreme physical harm.

data.value: You are slain. Envision your final moments — this is the end of your story.
You are dying. Without immediate aid you will not survive. An ally must make a move to save your life now.
A permanent harm is inflicted — a crippling wound, lost limb, or enduring illness. Envision the details and mark a new debility of your choosing.
You fall unconscious and are at the mercy of your surroundings. You cannot act until you are aided or the danger has passed.
The shock of the wound leaves you unable to act. You cannot make progress until you rest and recover at least 1 health.
You grit your teeth and hold on, barely. Suffer -1 momentum.
Against all expectations, you endure the blow. Recover +1 health.
Defying death itself, you rise renewed. Take +2 momentum.
